steps.title: Find the intercept value
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs when the input is $t=0$. Substitute $0$ into the function to find the starting value on the graph.
$$f(0)=6{,}400(0.75)^0$$
Because any nonzero number raised to the zero power equals $1$, the value is
$$f(0)=6{,}400(1)=6{,}400$$

steps.title: Interpret the time value
steps.content: The variable $t$ represents the number of years since the end of $2004$. Therefore, $t=0$ means $0$ years after that starting point, which is the end of $2004$.

steps.title: State the context meaning
steps.content: The intercept is not a minimum or maximum over the interval; it is the modeled value when the graph crosses the $y$-axis. In context, that value represents an estimated $6{,}400$ emails sent at the end of $2004$. The answer is D.
